stocks.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise delivers enterprise networking, servers, storage, and hybrid cloud solutions to businesses worldwide.
Marvell Technology designs data infrastructure semiconductors for cloud, 5G, automotive, and enterprise networking applications.
Fortinet provides network security appliances and cloud-based cybersecurity solutions for enterprises and service providers.
Arm Holdings licenses processor architectures and IP used in billions of chips powering smartphones, servers, and IoT devices.
Host Hotels & Resorts is the largest lodging REIT, owning luxury and upper-upscale hotels across major markets.
Okta provides identity and access management solutions securing authentication for enterprises and developers.
MGM Resorts International operates casino resorts, hotels, and entertainment venues in Las Vegas and globally.
Elevance Health provides health insurance through Anthem-branded plans plus Carelon health services.
Humana is a leading Medicare Advantage insurer offering health plans, pharmacy benefits, and wellness services.
Palo Alto Networks delivers next-generation cybersecurity platforms including firewalls, cloud security, and AI-driven threat detection.
United Rentals is the world's largest equipment rental company serving construction, industrial, and infrastructure customers.
Datadog provides cloud monitoring, observability, and security platforms for DevOps and engineering teams.
NetApp provides hybrid cloud data management, storage systems, and cloud data services for enterprises.
Old Dominion Freight Line is a leading less-than-truckload carrier providing regional and national freight services.
BorgWarner designs and manufactures propulsion systems and components for combustion, hybrid, and electric vehicles.
CrowdStrike provides cloud-native endpoint protection, threat intelligence, and identity security for enterprises.
Nucor Corporation is the largest U.S. steel producer, manufacturing steel and steel products using electric arc furnaces.
Centene Corporation is a managed care organization providing government-sponsored health insurance programs including Medicaid and Medicare.
Steel Dynamics is one of the largest U.S. steel producers making flat-rolled, long steel, and steel fabrication products.
J.B. Hunt Transport Services provides intermodal, dedicated contract, truckload, and final-mile logistics across North America.
CarMax is the largest used-vehicle retailer in the U.S., operating hundreds of stores with an omnichannel buying experience.
Morgan Stanley provides investment banking, equity trading, wealth management, and investment management globally.
Micron Technology manufactures DRAM and NAND flash memory chips for data centers, PCs, and mobile devices.
W.W. Grainger is a broad-line industrial distribution company supplying maintenance, repair, and operating products to businesses.
Cisco Systems designs networking hardware, software, cybersecurity, and collaboration solutions for enterprise and cloud customers.
Monster Beverage Corporation develops, markets, and distributes energy drinks and alternative beverages globally.
UnitedHealth Group provides health insurance, pharmacy benefits, and healthcare services through UnitedHealthcare and Optum.
First Solar manufactures thin-film photovoltaic solar panels and develops utility-scale solar energy projects in the U.S. and globally.
Illumina develops DNA sequencing and array-based technologies enabling genomic research, clinical diagnostics, and life sciences.
Essex Property Trust owns and operates apartment communities in the West Coast markets of California and the Pacific Northwest.
Super Micro Computer builds high-performance server and storage systems optimized for AI, cloud, and enterprise workloads.
Goldman Sachs is a leading global investment bank providing M&A advisory, trading, and asset management.
Marriott International is the world's largest hotel company, operating and franchising properties across 30+ brands globally.
Neurocrine Biosciences develops treatments for neurological and endocrine diseases including tardive dyskinesia and congenital adrenal hyperplasia.
F5, Inc. provides multi-cloud application security and delivery solutions that protect and optimize applications across any infrastructure.
Eli Lilly develops pharmaceuticals in diabetes, obesity, oncology, and immunology including tirzepatide.
Assurant provides specialty insurance and risk management products for mobile devices, housing, automotive, and credit markets.
State Street Corporation provides investment management, custody banking, and financial data services to institutional investors globally.
Keurig Dr Pepper is a beverage company owning brands including Dr Pepper, Keurig, Snapple, and 7UP.
ON Semiconductor designs power management, analog, and sensing semiconductors for automotive, industrial, and IoT applications.
Federal Realty Investment Trust owns and redevelops mixed-use retail real estate in high-density coastal markets.

stocks.full_name: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation
stocks.description: The Bank of New York Mellon provides custody banking, clearing, investment management, and financial data services globally.
CVS Health operates pharmacy retail chains, pharmacy benefit management (Caremark), and Aetna health insurance.
Seagate Technology manufactures hard disk drives and storage solutions for cloud, enterprise, and consumer markets.
Oracle provides enterprise database software, cloud infrastructure, and business applications to organizations globally.
Hilton Worldwide Holdings franchises and manages hotels across 18 brands including Hilton, Hampton, and DoubleTree.
Caesars Entertainment operates and owns casino resorts across the U.S. including Caesars Palace, Harrah's, and Horseshoe.
FactSet Research Systems provides financial data, analytics, and portfolio analysis software to investment professionals.
FedEx Corporation provides express delivery, freight transportation, logistics, and supply chain management services worldwide.
Western Digital produces hard drives, flash storage devices, and enterprise data storage infrastructure.
